synopsis: A detective story about a murder on a train based on a series of young-adult novels for women by Hiroyasu Yamaura. While suspended from school after beating up the seniors who bullied her best friend, Seiko goes for a trip to Nagasaki, where she finds herself involved in a murder mystery. (Source: Shoujo & General Weblog)

title: Let's Go Kaikigumi
titleNative: レッツゴー怪奇組
synopsis: The horror comedy manga begins one fateful day when the cowardly (unnamed) protagonist meets Mechako, the leader of the "Kaikigumi" organization which is in charge of the ghosts and supernatural creatures scaring humans. The protagonist somehow takes part in the revival of the Kaikigumi, after which one bizarre (yet not scary) phenomenon after another crops up around him. (Source: ANN)

title: ONE PIECE in LOVE: ONE PIECE DAY’25 Festival Eve Special
titleRomaji: Koisuru ONE PIECE: ONE PIECE DAY'25 Zenyasai Tokubetsu-hen
titleEnglish: ONE PIECE in LOVE: ONE PIECE DAY’25 Festival Eve Special
titleNative: 恋するワンピース ONE PIECE DAY'25 前夜祭特別編
synopsis: The special episode “ONE PIECE in LOVE: ONE PIECE DAY’25 Festival Eve Special”, which was surprise-screened at the ONE PIECE DAY’25 DAY1 on Saturday, August 9, 2025. This time, the characters of ONE PIECE in LOVE join in on the fun of ONE PIECE DAY’25! The episode also features Hiroshi Kitadani—known for the first ONE PIECE opening theme” We Are!”—making his debut as a voice actor! (Source: ONE PIECE Official YouTube Channel, edited) Note: This short briefly mentions some content from the Elbaf arc in the manga.

synopsis: Bomahead is about a girl and a robot who live in a junkyard. The robot claims he wants to fight for justice with hero-like abilities, but everything always turns out wrong. The mystery behind the girl and the robot are unraveled through a rapid succession of unexpected turn of events.

synopsis: The 3rd Duel Masters series. Story continues the one in Duel Masters Charge. A mysterious organization is interested in fledging duelist Shobu Kirifuda's ability to bring Duel Master creatures to life. With the support of his friends, Shobu duels with passion, discipline, and heart as he strives to be like his father and become the next Kaijudo master.

title: Tsuihou sareta Cheat Fuyo Majutsushi wa Kimama na Second Life wo Ouka suru.: Ore wa Buki dake ja Naku, Arayuru Mono ni "Kyouka Point" wo Fuyo Dekiru shi, Ore no Ishi de Itsudemo Kouka wo Kaijo Dekiru kedo, Nokotta Hitotachi Daijoubu?
titleRomaji: Tsuihou sareta Cheat Fuyo Majutsushi wa Kimama na Second Life wo Ouka suru.: Ore wa Buki dake ja Naku, Arayuru Mono ni "Kyouka Point" wo Fuyo Dekiru shi, Ore no Ishi de Itsudemo Kouka wo Kaijo Dekiru kedo, Nokotta Hitotachi Daijoubu?
titleNative: 追放されたチート付与魔術師は気ままなセカンドライフを謳歌する。　～俺は武器だけじゃなく、あらゆるものに『強化ポイント』を付与できるし、俺の意思でいつでも効果を解除できるけど、残った人たち大丈夫？～
synonyms: The Exiled Cheating Magician Enjoys an Unrestrained Second Life.: I Can Give "Strengthening Points" Not Only to Weapons, But Also to Everything, and I Can Unlock the Effect at Any Time of My Will, But are the Rest Okay?
synopsis: Rain Garland, an enchantment mage belonging to the ‘Fangs of the Royal Beast’, one of the continent's five great guilds, was suddenly expelled from the guild one day. Filled with bitter disappointment at being betrayed by those he trusted, Rain retrieved all the Enhancement Points he had placed on the guild's armor. He then tried applying them to his own sword and clothes instead the cheap copper sword gained destructive power rivaling legendary blades, and the simple cloth garments gained defense comparable to orichalcum!? Moreover, Rain's enchantment magic held a cheat-level secret that allowed it to evolve even further!? After meeting new companions like the renowned beautiful knight Lily, who came upon hearing rumors of Rain, and the noble lady Martina, a candidate for the title of Hero, Rain begins to grow into a great adventurer...!? (Source: Kodansha, translated)
